name: PACCAR
analysis: PCAR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry $118.9500, stop $111.5532, target $131.1302 (1.65:1) — then trail it.
